# Test GitHub server tool definitions (with fake token)
env GITHUB_TOKEN=fake_token_for_testing
exec go run . --timeout=5s
stdin tools_request.json
wait 5s
stdout '"tools"'
stdout '"get_repository"'
stdout '"list_repositories"'
stdout '"get_file_content"'
stdout '"list_branches"'
stdout '"create_issue"'
stdout '"list_issues"'

-- tools_request.json --
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/list"}
